subject: Galarian Farfetch'd, a dark-feathered bird Pokémon, wielding a leek stalk in a fighting stance
description: A duck-like bird creature with dark grey-black feathers and a white chest stands in an assertive fighting stance. The creature holds a thick leek stalk as a weapon, angled forward as if ready to strike. The background is an open daytime sky with light clouds and rocky terrain below. The posture and prop convey determination and martial readiness. The color contrast between the dark feathered body and the bright green leek is visually distinctive.
foreground: dark-feathered bird creature in fighting stance holding a leek
background: open sky with light clouds, rocky terrain
